semanticNodeLabels: Add artifact-level governance primitives to memory records
Formalize the epistemic, policy, and audit primitives that make Victor's memory system inspectable, phase-gated, and safe to promote beyond structural GraphRAG capability.
Teach heartbeat to select the next governed slice after phase closure
Add operator views for chain, decay, and governance inspection
Memory records carry explicit governance state and epistemic typing.
Stored memory can distinguish source-grounded observation from derived synthesis.
recommendedNextActions: Implement memory records carry explicit governance state and epistemic typing

before.title: Add artifact-level governance primitives to memory records
before.description: Extend Victor memory records with governance state, epistemic type, confidence profile, policy version, and provenance completeness so stored memory distinguishes observation, inference, synthesis, and contested material.
acceptance: Memory records carry explicit governance state and epistemic typing.
Confidence and provenance-completeness metadata are inspectable at the artifact level.
Stored memory can distinguish source-grounded observation from derived synthesis.
